upasarga_meanings.meaning: jora se gAnA jora se kahanA
jora se gAnA jora se kahanA
praSaMsA karanA stutI karanA jora se gAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra va indrAya mAdanaM gAyana' (f॰7.31.1) madakarErgAtEH kIrtayatetyarTaH
'pra gAyatrA agAmizuH (f॰8.1.7) prAgAsizuH pratiDvanitA baBUvuH
'anAdyo hyamaDyastaTA cApyanantaH pragIto'hamISo viBuH' (BA॰SAM॰142.90) pragItaH prakIrtitaH saMSabditaH
'pumBiH strIBiSca saNGuzwaH pragIta iva cABavad (giriH)' (BA॰ASva॰59.8) gItibahulaH gAnapracura ityarTaH
'yaTA me ruditErevaM pragIteva pUrI Bavet' (rA॰5.26.39) pragItA AkrozwumArabDA praSabda AdikarmaRi anupacarito DAtvarTaH
'prodgItAM maDupaltEH stutiM paWanto nftyanti (samIrAH)' (pra॰ca॰) ucCabdo gAnasToccEstvamAha praSabda uccEstvaM viSinazwi prodgItAm=proccErgItAm
'purARErimaM yajamAnaM rAjaBiH sADukfdBiH saNgAyateti taM saTA saNgAyanti' (Sa॰brA॰13.4.3.3) saNgAyanti=sAkaM gAyanti
'vIRAgATinO saMSAsti somaM rAjAnaM saNgAyetAmiti' (ASva॰gf॰1.14) ukto'rTaH
'saNgIyamAnasatkIrtiH sastrIBiH suragAyakEH' (BA॰pu॰3.22.33)
'sAmasaNgAyaH' (pA॰3.2.8 sUtravfttO) sAma suzWu gAyatIti
'yA gATAH sampragAyanti' (BA0 karRa0 4021) sampragAyanti=gAyantaH kaTayanti
'ikArAntaM cEvopAyaM sampragAyanti kutsAH' (lAwyA0 SrO0 71819) ukto'rTaH
'avagItaH KyAtagarhaRa ityamaraH' avagItaM janye syAd iti ca saH
'avagItAM gamite daSAmimAm' (ki0 27) avagItAm=ninditAm
'prakftyA kalyARI matiranavagItaH paricayaH' (uttara0 22) anavagItaH=anavadyaH
'avagItamidaM rUpam' (pratijYA0 48) ninditamityarTaH
'avagItamidaM sarvamAvAByAM BaktakAnanam' (hari0 289) BuktakAnanamiti pAWAntaram
'vigAyati ca yo loke yavanAnAM vilokanam' (Si0 BA0) nindati viruRadDi vA
'vigIyase manmaTadehadAhinA' (nE0 179) vigIyase=nindyase avakzipyase vigAnaM vacanIyatvam iti saNkIrRavargAnte svAminodDftaM vacaH
'aBicAraM cakArAsyetyavigAnA janaSrutiH' (rA0 7133) avigAnA=avisaMvAdA=avipratipannA
'yaScADarottarAnarTAn vigItAnnAvabuDyate' (manu0 853) vigItAn=virudDAn saMkulAn parasparavyAhatAn
'yastvA enA vijigAsan na Saknoti vigAtumArtimArCati' (jE0 brA0 1103) viSizya gAnamiha vigAnamuktaM na tu viroDoktirvigAnaM yaTA'nyatra
'satyapi prativedAntaM sfjyamAnezvAkASAdizu kramAdidvArake vigAne na kartari kiYcid vigAnamasti' (bra0 sU0 SAM0 BA0 1614) vigAnaM viroDoktiH
'sa ha smEByaH kAmAnAgAyati AgAtA ha vE kAmAnAM Bavati' (CAM0 u0 1214)
'kaM te kAmamAgAyAni' (CAM0 u0 179) kAmAnAgAyati sma gAnena sampAdayati sma AgAtA gAnena sampAdakaH AgAyAni gAnena sampAdayAmi
'yo vAci BAgastaM deveBya AgAyat' (Sa0 brA0 14413) ukto'rTaH
'vIRAmeva vAdayanto nigAyantaH' (Sa0 brA0 3246)
'taTA ca Srutayo bahvyo nigItA nigamezvapi (manu0 919) nigItAH paWitAH udboDitAH
'udagAsInma ityudgAtre' (E0 brA0 534) udgAnaM sAmna uccAraRam
'omiti hyudgAyati' (CAM0 u0 111)
'uta prAstOducca virdvA agAyat' (f0 10673) iha prastoturudgAtuSca pravfttI ukte
'navaBiraDvaryurudgAyati' (tE0 saM0 7582)
'yaSaH svamuccErudgIyamAnaM vanadevatABiH' (raGu0 212) uccErudgIyamAnamuccEH sasvaraM kIrtyamAnam uccEriti voditi vA SakyamekataraM tyaktum
'haMsakAraRqavod gItA' (nadyaH) (BA0 vana0) gAnaSabdanirBarA ityarTaH
'udgItametat paramaM tu brahma' (SvetA0 u0 17) udgItaM kIrtitamupavarRitam
'tadetatte mayodgItaM yaTAtaTam' (BA0 BIzma0 6569) paramaM guhyametanmayA te kaTitamaviplutArTamiti BAvaH
'tvadaDInA hi me prARAH kinnarodgItaBAziRi' (BA0 Adi0 17210) udgItaM gItam
'geyamudgAtukAmA' (meGa0 84)
'gAtA caturRAM vedAnAmudgAtA praTamartvijAm' (hari0 15410) udgAtA sAmaga ftvigviSezaH
'bfhaspati rvE devAnAmudagAyat' (paYca0 brA0 671) udagAyat OdgAtramakarodityarTaH
'aBi soBare girA gAya gA iva carkfzata' (f0 82019) aBigAya kIrtaya
'prARAMstvaM BUmAnamaBigAyatAt' (CAM0 u0 154) ukto'rTaH

'indragATABirvE devA asurAnaBigAyATEnAnatyAyan' (E0 brA0 632) aBigAya gItErvimugDAnkftvA yodDumABimuKyena prApyeti tu sAyaRaH tatraBavAn gAN gatO ityasya lyapi rUpaM paSyati tadapi Sakyagraham DAtustu viralaprayogaH
'apaGnannezi pavamAna SatrUn priyAM na jAro aBigIta induH' (f0 99623) aBigItaH praSastaH
'BfNgarAjABigItAni' (vanAni) (rA0 61511) maDurErguYjAravEranunAditAnItyAha
'indramaBi pra gAyata' (f0 151)
'kaRvA aBi pra gAyata' (f0 1371)
'tamvaBi pra gAyata puruhUtaM puruzwutam' (f0 8151)
'pavamAnamavasyavo vipramaBi pra gAyata' (f0 9132) sarvatrABizwutetyevArTaH
'pratyudgItastu KalvezAM taTodgAtA Bavati' (lAwyA0 SrO0 7819) pratyudgIto gAnena pratyuttaritaH
'aTEnaM sAmaBiH parigAyati' (Sa0 brA0 91233) imamaBitaH sAmAni gAyatItyarTaH
'nftyanti parigAyanti vedayanto mahad Bayam' (BA0 BIzma0 37) parigAyanti caYkramyamARA gAyantItyarTaH
'etEH karmaguRErloke nAmAgneH parigIyate' (BA0 anu0 8578) parigIyate sarvatra kIrtyate
'citAvAhitamudgAtA triryAmena parigAyan' (kA0 SrO0 22615) ukto'rTaH
'yAni nAmAni gORAni viKyAtAni mahAtmanaH fziBiH parigItAni…' (BA0 anu0 14913)..
'upagAyanti bIBatsuM nftyantyapsarasAM gaRAH' (BA0 Adi0 12353) upagAyanti samIpe puro vA gAyanti
'upAsmE gAyatA naraH' (f0 9111)
'gaRAstvopa gAyantu mArutAH' (aTarva0 4154) tvAM (parjanyam) upaSlokayantvityAha
'tAn hEtadupajagO' (Sa0 brA0 11558) iha prajApatiH kartA DAtuH triyAsAmAnye saMSabdane vyAharaRe vartate
'ati recayed yadanya upagAyed yadanya upaSfRuyAt tasmAtsvayamprastutamanupagItam' (Sa0 brA0 46917) upagAyet=gAyet
'upagIyamAnA BramarE rAjante vanarAjayaH' (BA0 vana0 11606) upagIyamAnA gAnaSabdena pUrRAH
'upagIyamAno ganDarvErbuBuje vizayAn priyAn' (vi0 pu0 1176) upagIyamAna upaSlokyamAnaH stUyamAnaH
'upagItopanfttaSca ganDarvApsarasAM gaREH' (BA0 u0 1234) upagItaH samIpe kftagAnaH
'upagAnaM kftvA' (mAla0 2) prAramBikaM gAnamupagAnam
'upagAdarSanAcca' (kA0 SrO0 673) udgAtari gAyati sati tamanusftya ye gAyanti ta upagAH
